# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Test PR

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v3
        with:
          node-version: '16'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm install

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Post comment with test results
        uses: marocchino/sticky-pull-request-comment@v2
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          header: Test Results
          message: |
            #### Test Results
            \`\`\`
            ${{ steps.test.outputs.exitcode }}
            ${{ steps.test.outputs.stdout }}
            ${{ steps.test.outputs.stderr }}
            \`\`\`

      - name: Store test results
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v3
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: test-results/**
